untranslatable_reason: Signal requires put/call ratio derived from options open sell volume data. This is not a price-based technical indicator and cannot be calculated from OHLCV price data alone. The signal depends on external options market microstructure data (put/call ratio by investor class) which is not available in the standard indicator set.
translation_notes: The core signal logic (sort by put/call ratio, long top decile, short bottom decile) is fundamentally untranslatable within a price-based backtester. A placeholder rule using volume > 50 contracts is provided as a structural template, but this does NOT capture the actual put/call ratio sorting mechanism. To implement this signal properly, the backtester would need access to: (1) options open sell volume aggregated by investor class, (2) put/call ratio calculations, and (3) cross-sectional decile ranking by this metric.
